title: PaperParser manifest.json schema
description: Schema for the manifest file of a PaperParser bundle. Captures paper metadata, analysis scope, and producer information.

schema_version.description: Semver version of the PaperParser schema specification.

paper.description: Metadata about the paper being analyzed.

authors.description: Ordered list of author names as they appear on the paper.

arxiv_id.description: arXiv identifier including optional version suffix (e.g., '2401.12345v2').

subject_area.description: Primary mathematical subject area. Prefer standard MSC-style descriptions (e.g., 'Functional Analysis', 'Algebraic Geometry', 'Probability Theory').

source_type.description: Source format the agent worked from.

source_files.description: List of source file names analyzed. For PDF input, this is ['paper.pdf'] or similar.

version_note.description: Free-text note about which version of the paper was analyzed.

scope.description: What was included in the analysis.

sections_included.description: List of section numbers included, or ['all'] for full paper. Examples: ['all'], ['1', '2', '3'], ['3', '4', 'A'].

analysis_level.description: Depth of analysis: 'bird_eye' (high-level structure only), 'frog_eye' (detailed proof-level), 'both' (full analysis).

producer.description: Information about the agent/tool that produced this bundle.

schema_version.description: Schema version the agent targeted. Must match top-level schema_version.
